calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mo To Compel Ans To Post-Judgt Disco
Off Calendar Sep-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel answers to post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorne'S Fees Pursuant To Ccp; Memo Of P & A; Declaration
Off Calendar Jun-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
On calendar Tuesday, June 6, 2006. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion for an award of attorneys fees is granted in the amount of $5,700. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2006 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2006 Continued To May-10-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Ntc Of Mo To Compel Attendance At Deposition & For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel attendance at deposition is granted. Counsel for the parties are ordered to meet and confer as to scheduling the deposition of Thomas Bach pursuant to the July 12, 2005 notice. The deposition is to be completed on or before February 17, 2006. The Court finds that defendant failed to make a reasonable and good faith effort to informally resolve the dispute. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $636.30 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Ex Parte Hearing On Right To Attach And For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment After Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's ex parte application for a writ of attachment is denied. The Court will grant a temporary protective order as to real property of Thomas Bach until March 8, 2006 so that counsel for plaintiff may file and serve a noticed application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
